case_title: DENISE LOUISE JAMESON VS. BODY CHOICE NUTRITION INC., et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMESON, DENISE LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT BODY CHOICE NUTRITION INC., A WYOMING CORPORATION BODY CHOICE NUTRITION INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
